name: yfinance
description: Fetch Yahoo Finance market data via the yfinance library. Use for stock, ETF, mutual fund, index, crypto, futures, or FX questions — current quotes, historical OHLCV (daily / intraday), and company / fund fundamentals (P/E, dividend yield, sector, analyst targets, AUM, etc.). Triggers include "current price", "YTD performance", "N-year chart", "P/E ratio", "compare/rank tickers", "what does X do", and non-US tickers like 0700.HK or BMW.DE.
